class \mbox{\hyperlink{classSIEForm}{SIEForm}}

\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Header for the \doxylink{classSIEForm}{SIEForm} class. 

The \doxylink{classSIEForm}{SIEForm} class is an abstract base for Surface Integral Equation (SIE) formulations. It holds shared context (RWG functions, Green\textquotesingle{}s function, incident fields, angular frequency) and defines the interface that concrete formulations must implement to assemble the linear system. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{SIEForm_8h_source}{SIEForm.\+h}}.
